title: Select and Use Content Creation Template
description: Validate user can select a template from curated list and pre-populated prompts appear in post creation screen.
steps:
Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Open template selection
Select a template from the curated list
Verify post creation screen loads with template prompts pre-populated
expected: Post creation screen shows relevant prompts and formatting for selected template
successCriteria: Template prompts appear correctly and post creation screen is pre-populated

title: Mandatory Fields Enforcement for Template
description: Verify Post button is enabled only after mandatory fields for the selected template are completed.
steps:
Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Select 'Good Reads' template
Leave mandatory field 'Paste link' empty
Verify Post button is disabled
Enter valid online link in 'Paste link'
Verify Post button is enabled
expected: Post button disabled until mandatory fields are completed; enabled after valid input
successCriteria: Post button state correctly reflects mandatory field completion

title: Hashtag Auto-generation from Template Name
description: Verify hashtags are auto-generated from template names in Pascal casing without spaces and appear on posts.
steps:
Create post using 'Good Reads' template
Complete mandatory fields
Submit post
Verify hashtag '#GoodReads' is added to post caption
Search feed using hashtag '#GoodReads'
Verify post appears in search results
expected: Hashtag auto-generated and searchable in feed
successCriteria: Hashtag present on post and searchable

title: Template Availability Based on User Role
description: Verify templates are available to correct personas; 'Org Update' restricted to admin and manager roles.
steps:
Login as Employee
Open template selection
Verify 'Org Update' template is not visible
Login as Manager
Open template selection
Verify 'Org Update' template is visible
Login as Admin
Open template selection
Verify 'Org Update' template is visible
expected: 'Org Update' template visible only to Manager and Admin personas
successCriteria: Access to 'Org Update' template restricted correctly

title: Template Ordering for First-time User
description: Verify first-time users see prioritized templates 'Ice Breaker' and 'Seeking Mentorship' with sample previews.
steps:
Login as first-time user
Open template selection
Verify 'Ice Breaker' and 'Seeking Mentorship' templates appear at top
Verify sample post previews are shown for these templates
expected: Templates ordered with priority and sample previews shown
successCriteria: Template priority and previews match first-time user experience

title: Template Ordering for Returning User
description: Verify returning users see templates ordered by usage and contribution history with separate section for contributed templates.
steps:
Login as returning user (last contribution >14 days ago)
Open template selection
Verify templates ordered as per contribution history
Verify separate section for templates already contributed to
Verify emphasis on topics not yet contributed
expected: Templates ordered correctly with sections and emphasis
successCriteria: Returning user template ordering and sections displayed correctly

title: Preview Post Feature for Each Template
description: Verify users can preview posts before submission for each template type.
steps:
Open 'Create Post'
Select any template
Fill mandatory fields
Click 'Preview' button
Verify preview modal/dialog shows post content as it will appear on feed
Close preview
Submit post
expected: Preview displays correct post content before submission
successCriteria: Preview feature works for all templates

title: Template Discovery via Carousel on Main Feed
description: Verify templates are discoverable via carousel on main feed and clicking opens template creation screen.
steps:
Open Vibe main feed
Locate templates carousel
Scroll through carousel
Click on a template card
Verify post creation screen opens with selected template prompts
expected: Carousel displays templates and clicking opens creation screen
successCriteria: Templates discoverable and selectable via carousel

title: Contextual Template Suggestions Based on Feed Content
description: Verify relevant templates are suggested contextually based on feed content and clicking opens quick pop-up to create post.
steps:
1. Open main feed with specific content context
2. Verify contextual template suggestions appear
3. Click on a suggested template
4. Verify quick pop-up opens with template prompts for post creation
expected: Contextual template suggestions appear and open quick creation pop-up
successCriteria: Contextual suggestions function correctly

title: Template Discovery via Dedicated Section
description: Verify dedicated 'Create with Template' section exists in post creation screen with curated templates by purpose.
steps:
Open 'Create Post' screen
Locate 'Create with Template' section
Verify curated templates grouped by purpose are displayed
Select a template
Verify post creation screen pre-populated with template prompts
expected: Dedicated section present and functional
successCriteria: Dedicated template section works correctly

title: Schedule Post with Future Date and Time
description: Verify users can schedule posts with specific future date and time for publication.
steps:
Open 'Create Post'
Select template or regular post
Fill mandatory fields
Enable 'Schedule Post' option
Select future date and time
Submit post
Verify post is saved as scheduled
expected: Post scheduled successfully for future publication
successCriteria: Post scheduled with correct date and time

title: Edit Scheduled Post Before Posting Time
description: Verify users can edit scheduled posts before the scheduled posting time.
steps:
Navigate to scheduled posts list
Select a scheduled post
Edit content or schedule date/time
Save changes
Verify updated scheduled post details
expected: Scheduled post updated successfully
successCriteria: Scheduled post editable before posting time

title: Cancel Scheduled Post Before Posting Time
description: Verify users can cancel scheduled posts before the scheduled posting time.
steps:
Navigate to scheduled posts list
Select a scheduled post
Click 'Cancel' or 'Delete'
Confirm cancellation
Verify post is removed from scheduled list
expected: Scheduled post cancelled successfully
successCriteria: Scheduled post removed before posting time

title: Scheduled Post Publishes Automatically at Selected Time
description: Verify scheduled posts publish automatically at the selected date and time.
steps:
Schedule a post with near future date/time
Wait until scheduled time
Verify post appears on feed automatically
expected: Scheduled post published on feed at correct time
successCriteria: Post appears on feed at scheduled time

title: Attachment Upload Limits and Hover Info
description: Verify users can upload attachments within limits and attachment limits info appears on hover.
steps:
Open 'Create Post'
Hover over each attachment icon (gif, images, files, videos)
Verify tooltip shows max count and size limits
Upload 1 gif from library
Upload up to 5 images, each <=10MB
Upload up to 5 files, each <=10MB
Upload up to 5 videos, each <=250MB
Try to upload one more than allowed
Verify upload is blocked or error shown
expected: Attachment limits enforced and info displayed on hover
successCriteria: Attachment upload respects limits and hover info visible

title: Attachment Upload Behavior Consistency with Regular Posts
description: Verify attachment upload behavior in templates matches regular post creation.
steps:
Create regular post with attachments
Create post using template with attachments
Verify upload process, limits, and UI behavior are consistent
expected: Attachment upload behavior consistent across post types
successCriteria: Attachment handling identical for templates and regular posts

title: Allow Comments & Replies Toggle Visibility and Behavior
description: Verify 'Allow Comments & Replies' toggle is visible only if admin enabled globally and user can override per post.
steps:
Login as user
Check if admin has enabled comments globally
If enabled, open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle is visible
Toggle on/off
Submit post
Verify post reflects toggle setting
If admin disabled globally, verify toggle is hidden
expected: Toggle visibility and override behavior as per admin setting
successCriteria: Toggle behaves correctly based on admin global setting

title: Post on Behalf of Company Toggle Visibility for Admin
description: Verify 'Post on Behalf of Company' toggle is visible only to admin persona.
steps:
Login as Admin
Open 'Create Post'
Verify 'Post on Behalf of Company' toggle is visible
Login as Manager or Employee
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle is not visible
expected: Toggle visible only to admin users
successCriteria: Toggle access restricted to admin persona

title: Toggle Placement After Main Content Entry
description: Verify toggles are placed after main content entry to avoid distraction.
steps:
Open 'Create Post'
Observe UI layout
Verify toggles appear only after main content input area
expected: Toggles placed after content entry section
successCriteria: Toggle placement matches design suggestion

title: Good Reads Template Link Validation
description: Verify Good Reads template requires valid online link and shows error if invalid.
steps:
Select 'Good Reads' template
Enter invalid link (e.g., 'invalidlink') in mandatory field
Attempt to submit post
Verify error message 'Only an online link can be entered in this field.' is shown
Enter valid online link
Verify error disappears and post can be submitted
expected: Link validation enforced with proper error message
successCriteria: Invalid links rejected with error; valid links accepted

title: Mandatory Field Enforcement for Pet Pics Template
description: Verify 'Pet Pics' template requires at least one picture upload before enabling Post button.
steps:
Select 'Pet Pics' template
Do not upload any picture
Verify Post button is disabled
Upload one picture
Verify Post button is enabled
expected: Post button enabled only after picture upload
successCriteria: Mandatory picture upload enforced

title: Character Limit Enforcement for Seeking Mentorship Template
description: Verify character limits are enforced for poster text in Seeking Mentorship template as per design confirmation.
steps:
1. Select Seeking Mentorship template
2. Enter poster text exceeding character limit
3. Verify input is restricted or error message shown
4. Enter poster text within limit
5. Verify post button is enabled
expected: Character limits are enforced and validated correctly
successCriteria: Character limit validation functions correctly

title: Audience Selection Rules from Main Feed
description: Verify default audience and audience change options when creating post from main feed.
steps:
From main feed, click 'Create Post'
Verify default audience is 'All Employees'
Change audience to a group user is part of
Change audience to department
Change audience to location
Change audience to network
Verify audience changes are accepted
expected: Default audience set and user can change audience as per rules
successCriteria: Audience selection behaves as specified

title: Audience Selection Rules from Within Group
description: Verify default audience and audience change restrictions when creating post from within a group.
steps:
From within a group user is part of, click 'Create Post'
Verify default audience is group members
Verify audience selection is disabled and cannot be changed
expected: Audience fixed to group members and cannot be changed
successCriteria: Audience selection restricted correctly in group context

title: Nudges for Content Generation
description: Verify users receive nudges like 'explore templates' and 'x days since last contribution'.
steps:
Login as user
Observe main feed and create post screen
Verify nudges such as 'explore templates' and 'x days since last contribution' are displayed appropriately
expected: Nudges visible to encourage content creation
successCriteria: Nudges displayed as per user status

title: Post Button Disabled Until Mandatory Fields Completed
description: Verify Post button remains disabled until all mandatory fields for selected template are completed.
steps:
Select any template with mandatory fields
Leave mandatory fields empty
Verify Post button is disabled
Fill all mandatory fields
Verify Post button is enabled
expected: Post button state reflects mandatory field completion
successCriteria: Post button enabled only after mandatory fields are completed
